data.title: Microservices Infrastructure
data.description: Microsoft.com is built on a microservices architecture, allowing for scalability and independent deployment of services.

data.title: Cloud Integration
data.description: The site is integrated with Microsoft's Azure cloud services for hosting and scaling.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Utilizes a global CDN to deliver content quickly to users around the world.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Adaptive UI layouts ensure usability across a wide range of devices.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Manages and routes internal and external API calls with secure protocols.
